sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9335" key="a)nousio/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνουσιότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ητος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n9335.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unsubstantiality,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simp.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in de An.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4013.tlg001:247:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">247.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
